$comment: Forbidden banking-entity phrases that must never reappear in blog content. Loaded by scripts/lint-banned-banking-entities.mjs. Matching is case-insensitive and whitespace-flexible (any run of whitespace inside a phrase matches one or more whitespace chars). See exentax-web/docs/fact-check-2026.md (issue catalog) and exentax-web/docs/banking-facts-2026.md (Revolut Business section, SOT) for the underlying truth claims.

phrases.reason: Entity does not exist. Use 'Revolut Technologies Inc.' with 'Lead Bank' as US banking partner for US LLCs.
